name: Harpenden 'Very Last Chance' County Qualifier
summary: A brilliant final push before the county entry deadline, with a clutch of new qualifying times and personal bests across the team.
highlights: New Hertfordshire county qualifying times secured
Personal bests across all age groups
Standout swims in 100m breaststroke and 50m butterfly

name: Club Championships, Round 3
summary: The final round of the 2025 Club Champs brought the season's internal racing to a close with packed heats from Development through Performance.
highlights: Club Championship trophies decided across all age groups
First-ever Club Champs swims for a dozen Development squad members
Season-long points race went down to the final relay

name: Watford County Qualifier
summary: A fast-paced weekend at Watford with strong BASC representation across two full days of racing.
highlights: New county times posted across multiple age groups
Strong 200m freestyle performances from the Competitive squad
Great team support on poolside all weekend
